race.comment: DAISY DUCK (7) comes up from Victoria and now in the Cavanough yard. Has a host of gear changes for this after finishing a close-up eighth over 1400m at Pakenham on February 26. No shock to see her get off the mark at start six. DIVA ROUGE (3) kept fresh and back in class with a sound head second over this track and trip. Improving with racing and gets her chance in this winnable contest. EXTREMELY PERFECT (1) having his first start for the Jacob Perrett stable after disappointing in two starts. Just under a month between runs with a fading seventh over 1200m at Gosford. Will push forward from the good draw and can play a leading role. LOBBYIST (9) ran a sound second first-up, then jumped in grade with a fading seventh over 1150m at Beaumont (Newcastle). Can bounce back quickly with fitness on her side. UNDER THE COLLAR (2) covered a stack of ground on debut with a tiring ninth in a Super Maiden over this track and trip. Gets a better set-up for this. Respect.
